sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47263" key="h(miselh/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμισελήνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n47263.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half the apparent breadth of the moon</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
